series_metadata.series_description: Records associated with allegations of misconduct by agents/agencies/unlicensed individuals/entities. All records created, submitted, and/or obtained in conjunction with an alleged violation of an Ohio insurance law committed by an insurance agent, agency, company or an unlicensed individual and/or entity. Excludes electronic records maintained in the invesigation module database.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years, then shred/erase. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years, then shred/erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
